problem: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function?
mechanism: Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region
hypothesis: The key to Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function? is Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region — specifically Glial cell activation/suppression — which would help 8,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 23 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
